---
title: "CAZ Results"
params:
  current_caz: "Bristol"
---

## Overview

This page presents comprehensive analysis for the **`{r} params$current_caz`** Clean Air Zone, including prescription trends and hospital admissions data. The analysis examines changes before and after CAZ implementation (2023), comparing practices and districts within and around the CAZ boundaries to control groups.

---

## Part 1: Prescription Trends

### Introduction

This section presents prescription patterns for key respiratory medications, examining whether air quality improvements in the CAZ are associated with changes in medication use.

### SABA Analysis

#### SABA Ratio

Comparing the ratio of SABA inhalers to all respiratory inhalers. Lower ratios may indicate improved asthma control with better use of preventative medications.

![SABA Ratio Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_SABA_ratio.png)

#### SABA Numerator (per patient)

Prescription rates of SABA inhalers per registered patient.

![SABA Numerator Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_SABA_numerator.png)

#### SABA Denominator (all inhalers per patient)

Overall inhaler prescription rates as a baseline metric.

![SABA Denominator Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_SABA_denominator.png)

### Montelukast Analysis

Prescription trends for Montelukast (BNF code 0303020G0), a leukotriene receptor antagonist used in asthma management.

![Montelukast Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_0303020G0.png)

### Antidepressants Analysis

Prescription trends for Antidepressants (BNF code 0403).

![Antidepressants Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_0403.png)

### Anxiolytics Analysis

Prescription trends for Anxiolytics (BNF code 040102).

![Anxiolytics Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_040102.png)

### Methylprednisolone Analysis

Prescription trends for Methylprednisolone (BNF code 0603020S0), an oral corticosteroid used in respiratory and inflammatory conditions.

![Methylprednisolone Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_0603020S0.png)

### Thiazide Diuretics Analysis

Prescription trends for Thiazide Diuretics (BNF code 020201).

![Thiazide Diuretics Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_020201.png)

### ACE Inhibitors Analysis

Prescription trends for ACE Inhibitors (BNF code 0205051).

![ACE Inhibitors Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_0205051.png)

### ARBs Analysis

Prescription trends for ARBs (BNF code 020505).

![ARBs Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_020505.png)

### Beta Blockers Analysis

Prescription trends for Beta Blockers (BNF code 0204).

![Beta Blockers Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_0204.png)

### Statins Analysis

Prescription trends for Statins (BNF code 0212).

![Statins Trend](../figures/trend_`{r} params$current_caz`_0212.png)

### Main BNF Codes Analysis

Prescription trends across all main BNF medication categories.

```{r}
#| label: insert-main-bnf-figures
#| results: asis

codes_tmp <- list.files(
  pattern = paste0(params$current_caz, "_\\d{2}.png$"),
  path = "qmds_ghpages/figures/"
)

for (code in codes_tmp) {
  capt = stringr::str_extract(code, "\\d{2}")

  cat("#### BNF Code ", capt, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("![](../figures/", code, ")\n\n", sep = "")
}

```

---

## Part 2: Health Indicators (Fingertips)

We examine health indicators from NHS Digital's Fingertips platform, comparing `{r} params$current_caz` against a national control group of non-CAZ districts.

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Asthma Admissions (Under 19)

We plot emergency hospital admissions for asthma for under-19-year-olds in `{r} params$current_caz`, grouped by age. The plot includes a dashed control line representing trends in non-CAZ districts for comparison.

![](../figures/admissions_`{r} params$current_caz`.png)

### Stroke Admissions

We plot emergency hospital admissions due to stroke for all ages in `{r} params$current_caz`. The plot includes a dashed control line representing trends in non-CAZ districts for comparison.

![](../figures/admissions_90986_`{r} gsub(" ", "_", params$current_caz)`.png)

### Stroke Prevalence (QOF)

We plot the recorded QOF prevalence percentage of stroke (all ages) in `{r} params$current_caz`. The plot includes a dashed control line representing trends in non-CAZ districts for comparison.

![](../figures/admissions_212_`{r} gsub(" ", "_", params$current_caz)`.png)

:::
